_comment: Positional column overrides for Bart Torvik getadvstats.php?csv=1 (verified from the 2026 --inspect dump, 67-column layout). player_tail maps the high-drift per-game box columns; oreb+dreb=reb at 57/58/59 anchors the mapping. 'position' is corrected from 33 (hometown) to 64 (Torvik position type).
